name: Rend
description: Rend is a tall figure, with light umbrae brown to dark brown hair that's styled as a mullet. He usually wears a mask that covers everything outside of his right eye and scar. He has scars all over his figure. He wears a long cloak that is almost wispy and shadowy at the bottom of his cloak. Spikes over the shoulders. His emotions reflect off the colors of the earrings he wears and the amount of mist that covers him.  He doesn't have a mouth.
creator: Desperend
